description: Letter from Ṣadaqa b. Salāma Ibn Nufayʿ, Tyre, to his father Shelomo b. Saʿadya (aka Abū Naṣr Salāma b. Saʿīd Ibn Nufayʿ), Fustat. Dated: 1 Ramaḍān 483 AH = 28 October 1090 CE. He plans to go on a business trip to Acre and return to Tyre. He then plans to move with his new wife to Jubayl. He expresses sorrow at the separation from his father.
